sentence: I _____ my homework yet, so I really can't go out to play right now.
explanation: yet 常與現在完成式連用，表示「到目前為止尚未」完成，故用 haven't finished。

sentence: The window _____ by the strong wind during last night's heavy storm.
explanation: 窗戶是動作的承受者（被風吹破），且為過去事件，故用過去被動 was broken。

sentence: The girl _____ won the speech contest last week is my best friend.
explanation: 先行詞 girl 是人，且在關係子句中當主詞，故用主格關係代名詞 who。

sentence: This box is much _____ than that one, so I can't carry it by myself.
explanation: than 表比較，heavy 為單音節形容詞，比較級加 -er 為 heavier；much 用來修飾比較級。

sentence: _____ it was raining very hard, the players kept practicing on the field.
explanation: 前後語意轉折（雖然下大雨，仍繼續練習），用表讓步的連接詞 Although。

sentence: My father enjoys _____ in the river near our house every summer morning.
explanation: enjoy 後面接動名詞 V-ing 當受詞，故用 swimming。

sentence: While I _____ dinner in the kitchen, the telephone suddenly rang.
explanation: while 引導一個正在進行的動作，期間發生另一件事，故用過去進行式 was cooking。

sentence: The movie was so _____ that some young children started to cry in the theater.
explanation: 修飾事物且「使人害怕」用現在分詞 frightening；frightened 是人「感到害怕」，主詞是 movie 故用 frightening。

sentence: I have a classmate _____ father is a well-known doctor in our city.
explanation: 表示「同學的父親」這種所有關係，用所有格關係代名詞 whose。

sentence: Mount Jade is the _____ mountain in Taiwan, and many people hope to climb it.
explanation: in Taiwan 表示在某範圍內「最…」，用最高級 the highest。

sentence: She went to the library _____ some reference books for her science report.
explanation: 表示「為了…」的目的，用不定詞 to borrow。

sentence: A brand-new bridge _____ next year to connect the two small mountain villages.
explanation: 橋是被建造的（被動），且時間在未來，故用未來被動 will be built。

sentence: My brother and I _____ students at the same junior high school.
explanation: 主詞 my brother and I 為複數，be動詞現在式用 are。

sentence: Chris _____ tired after the long trip.
explanation: 主詞 Chris 為第三人稱單數，連綴動詞 look 需加 -s，故 looks。

sentence: The flowers in the garden _____ beautiful this spring.
explanation: 主詞 the flowers 為複數，連綴動詞不加 -s，故 look。

sentence: My grandmother _____ very happy when she saw us.
explanation: 句意描述過去看到我們時的反應，故用過去式 looked。

sentence: Yesterday, they _____ hungry after playing basketball for two hours.
explanation: 主詞 they 為複數，且描述過去（yesterday），be動詞用 were。

sentence: This cake _____ great; can I have a piece?
explanation: 主詞 this cake 為第三人稱單數，連綴動詞加 -s，故 smells。

sentence: My uncle _____ a soldier ten years ago.
explanation: 主詞 my uncle 為單數，過去時間（ten years ago），be動詞用 was。

sentence: My little sister _____ only five years old now.
explanation: 主詞 my little sister 為單數，現在式，be動詞用 is。

sentence: The music from the concert _____ amazing.
explanation: 主詞 the music 為單數，連綴動詞加 -s，故 sounds。

sentence: My father _____ to work by bus every day.
explanation: 主詞 my father 為第三人稱單數，一般動詞現在式加 -es，故 goes。

sentence: She always _____ her teeth before going to bed.
explanation: 主詞 she 搭配 always，第三人稱單數動詞加 -es，故 brushes。

sentence: The store _____ at nine o'clock every morning.
explanation: 主詞 the store 為第三人稱單數，動詞加 -s，故 opens。

sentence: My parents usually _____ dinner together on weekends.
explanation: 主詞 my parents 為複數，一般動詞現在式不加 -s，故 cook。

sentence: Tom never _____ breakfast before school.
explanation: 主詞 Tom 搭配 never，第三人稱單數動詞加 -s，故 eats。

sentence: The bus _____ this route twice an hour.
explanation: 主詞 the bus 為單數，動詞加 -s，故 runs。

sentence: Our teacher usually _____ us a lot of homework.
explanation: 主詞 our teacher 為單數，動詞加 -s，故 gives。

sentence: Most students in our class _____ bicycles to school.
explanation: 主詞 most students 為複數，動詞不加 -s，故 ride。

sentence: Last summer, my family _____ to Kaohsiung for a short vacation.
explanation: 句子描述 last summer 發生的事，用過去式 traveled。

sentence: He _____ his key somewhere in the classroom yesterday.
explanation: yesterday 表示過去，動詞用過去式 lost。

sentence: We _____ a wonderful movie at the theater last night.
explanation: last night 表示過去，動詞用過去式 watched。

sentence: I think it _____ rain tomorrow afternoon, so bring an umbrella.
explanation: 以 I think 表達對未來的預測看法，用 will 表未來。

sentence: Look at those dark clouds! It _____ rain very soon.
explanation: dark clouds 是眼前可見的證據，依此推測即將發生的事用 be going to，而非單純預測用的 will。

sentence: Please be quiet. The baby _____ in the next room right now.
explanation: right now 表示此刻正在進行的動作，用現在進行式 is sleeping。

sentence: Look! The kids _____ soccer in the yard at this moment.
explanation: at this moment 表示正在發生，用現在進行式 are playing，主詞複數用 are。

sentence: This umbrella is not mine. Is it _____?
explanation: 詢問傘的所有權，用所有代名詞 yours（= your umbrella）。

sentence: Mary hurt _____ while riding her bike yesterday.
explanation: Mary 弄傷了「自己」，動作回歸主詞本身，用反身代名詞 herself。

sentence: The dog buried _____ bone in the backyard.
explanation: 狗埋的是「牠的」骨頭，用所有格 its 修飾名詞 bone。

sentence: My father works as _____ engineer in a big company.
explanation: engineer 為母音開頭的可數名詞單數，冠詞用 an。

sentence: _____ moon looks especially bright tonight.
explanation: 月亮是獨一無二的事物，用定冠詞 The。

sentence: You _____ finish your homework before you watch TV.
explanation: 句意表達「強制性義務」要先做完功課，用 must。

sentence: When I was a child, I _____ to visit my grandparents every summer.
explanation: 描述過去經常性但現在已不做的習慣，用 used to。

sentence: _____ you help me carry these boxes upstairs?
explanation: 禮貌地請求他人幫忙，用情態助動詞 Could。

sentence: The concert will start _____ 7:30 in the evening.
explanation: 表示明確時刻用 at，7:30 是時間點。

sentence: There is a nice café _____ the corner of this street.
explanation: on the corner 表示在街角，為固定介系詞搭配。

sentence: I _____ this book twice, so I don't need to read it again.
explanation: twice 搭配現在完成式表示經驗次數，故用 have read。

sentence: She _____ to Japan three times since she was a child.
explanation: since she was a child 表示從過去持續到現在的經驗，用現在完成式 has been。

sentence: We _____ each other since elementary school.
explanation: since elementary school 表示從過去持續至今的狀態，用現在完成式 have known。

sentence: This backpack is _____ than the one I bought last year.
explanation: than 表比較，comfortable 為多音節形容詞需加 more。

sentence: Of all the students in our class, David runs _____.
explanation: of all the students 表示三者以上比較，用最高級 the fastest。

sentence: My parents decided _____ a new car this year.
explanation: decide 後面接不定詞 to-V，故用 to buy。

sentence: It is important _____ enough water every day.
explanation: 不定詞作主詞補語表達「重要的是要做的事」，用 It is important to-V。

sentence: She went to the library _____ some information for her report.
explanation: 不定詞表目的（去圖書館的目的），故用 to find。

sentence: He really enjoys _____ basketball with his friends after school.
explanation: enjoy 後面須接動名詞 V-ing 當受詞，故用 playing。

sentence: She is interested in _____ a new language.
explanation: be interested in 為介系詞片語，後面須接動名詞，故用 learning。

sentence: This bridge _____ over one hundred years ago.
explanation: 橋是被建造的一方，且為過去事件，用過去被動 was built。

sentence: The letters _____ by the secretary every morning.
explanation: 信件是被分類的一方，主詞複數用現在被動 are sorted。

sentence: The rules _____ carefully by all the players before the game starts.
explanation: 規則是被遵守的一方，搭配情態助動詞的被動用 must be followed。

sentence: The woman _____ lives next door is a famous singer.
explanation: 先行詞 the woman 為人，用關代 who。

sentence: I still have the pen _____ my father gave me for my birthday.
explanation: 先行詞 the pen 為物，用關代 which。

sentence: _____ it was raining heavily, we still went hiking as planned.
explanation: 前後句意為讓步關係（儘管下大雨仍去健行），用 Although。

sentence: You can choose _____ tea or coffee for breakfast.
explanation: either...or 表示兩者擇一，故用 either。

sentence: I _____ for over two hours, so I am very tired now.
explanation: for over two hours 搭配現在完成進行式，強調持續到現在的動作，故用 have been studying。

sentence: He _____ Chinese for six years, and he still enjoys it.
explanation: for six years 且動作持續進行至今，用現在完成進行式 has been learning。

sentence: They _____ this song over and over since this morning; it's stuck in my head now.
explanation: since this morning 搭配現在完成進行式，強調反覆持續的動作，故用 have been singing。

sentence: Do you remember the day _____ we first met at the school festival?
explanation: 先行詞 the day 為時間，用關係副詞 when。

sentence: This is the small town _____ my grandparents have lived for fifty years.
explanation: 先行詞 the small town 為地點，用關係副詞 where。

sentence: If I _____ a bird, I would fly all over the world.
explanation: 與現在事實相反的假設語氣，If 子句 be動詞一律用 were。

sentence: If she studied harder, she _____ pass the exam easily.
explanation: 假設語氣的主要子句用 would + 原形動詞。

sentence: I would help you with the project if I _____ more free time.
explanation: 與現在事實相反的假設語氣，If 子句用過去式 had。

sentence: We saw him _____ the ball into the goal during the last minute of the game.
explanation: 感官動詞 see 後接受詞補語用原形動詞表示完整動作，故用 kick。

sentence: We heard the birds _____ beautifully outside the window this morning.
explanation: 感官動詞 hear 後接 V-ing 表示動作正在進行中，故用 singing。

sentence: My mom always makes me _____ my room before I go out to play.
explanation: 使役動詞 make 後面接受詞補語須用原形動詞，故用 clean。

sentence: The teacher let the students _____ early because of the typhoon warning.
explanation: 使役動詞 let 後面接受詞補語須用原形動詞，故用 leave。

sentence: Could you tell me _____ the nearest MRT station is?
explanation: 間接問句須維持直述語序（主詞+動詞），只需 where，不能保留疑問語序 where is。

sentence: I wonder _____ he will come to the party tonight.
explanation: wonder 後接間接問句，表示是否，用連接詞 if。

sentence: _____ she said surprised everyone at the meeting.
explanation: What she said（她說的話）作整個句子的主詞，為名詞子句，故用 What。

sentence: I don't know _____ the shop is open on Sundays.
explanation: don't know 後接是否的名詞子句，用 whether。

sentence: The fact _____ he lied to us made everyone very angry.
explanation: the fact that... 為同位語名詞子句，說明 fact 的內容，用 that。

sentence: _____ tired from the long journey, the travelers decided to rest at a nearby hotel.
explanation: 原句為 Because they felt tired，簡化為分詞構句用現在分詞 Feeling。

sentence: _____ by the loud noise, the baby began to cry suddenly.
explanation: 嬰兒是被嚇到的一方，被動意義用過去分詞 Frightened。

sentence: _____ his homework, Tom finally went out to play basketball.
explanation: 先做完功課才出去玩，動作發生在主要子句之前，用完成式分詞構句 Having finished。

sentence: _____ in a small village, she never had the chance to see the ocean until she was twenty.
explanation: 在鄉下長大的經驗發生在主要子句之前，用完成式分詞構句 Having grown up。

sentence: _____ heavily outside, we decided to stay home and watch a movie.
explanation: 原句為 Because it was raining heavily，簡化為分詞構句用現在分詞 Raining。

sentence: _____ how to swim, my little brother was afraid of the deep end of the pool.
explanation: 否定分詞構句，not 放在分詞前，故用 Not knowing。

sentence: _____ with a difficult problem, the students asked their teacher for help.
explanation: 學生是面對難題的一方，被動意義用過去分詞 Faced。

sentence: _____ every possible solution, the engineers still could not fix the machine.
explanation: 嘗試所有方法發生在無法修好之前，用完成式分詞構句 Having tried。

sentence: _____ carefully, the plan should work perfectly.
explanation: 計畫是被遵循的一方，被動意義用過去分詞 Followed。

sentence: _____ from the top of the tower, the city looked absolutely beautiful.
explanation: 城市是被看見的一方，被動意義用過去分詞 Seen。

sentence: _____ nothing more to say, she quietly left the room.
explanation: Having nothing more to say 表示「因為沒有更多話要說」，用現在分詞 Having。

sentence: _____ by her classmates' kind words, Amy felt much better about the contest.
explanation: Amy 是被鼓勵的一方，被動意義用過去分詞 Encouraged。

sentence: _____ the instructions carefully, he still could not assemble the shelf correctly.
explanation: 雖然讀了說明書，仍組裝不好，讓步語氣搭配完成式分詞構句 Having read。

sentence: _____ that the shop was closed, we decided to order food online instead.
explanation: 發現店家關門後才決定改叫外送，主動意義用現在分詞 Realizing。

sentence: _____ from a wealthy family, he never had to worry about money as a child.
explanation: Coming from a wealthy family 表示因為出身富裕家庭，用現在分詞 Coming。

sentence: _____ down by the rain, the flowers in the garden looked a little sad.
explanation: 花是被雨打的一方，被動意義用過去分詞 Beaten。

sentence: _____ have I seen such a beautiful sunset as the one last night.
explanation: Never 放句首表示「從未」，需倒裝為 have + 主詞 + p.p.。

sentence: _____ she got home did she realize that she had left her phone on the bus.
explanation: Not until 為否定副詞片語放句首，主要子句須倒裝為 did + 主詞 + 原形。

sentence: _____ had the concert begun when the singer suddenly lost her voice.
explanation: No sooner...when 表示「一...就」，No sooner 放句首須倒裝 had + 主詞 + p.p.。

sentence: _____ does he complain about his heavy workload at the office.
explanation: Rarely 為頻率副詞，放句首表示「很少」，須倒裝為 does + 主詞 + 原形。

sentence: _____ did I imagine that I would win first prize in the speech contest.
explanation: Little 表示「一點也不」，放句首須倒裝為 did + 主詞 + 原形。

sentence: _____ have I tasted such delicious dumplings before this trip.
explanation: Seldom 表示「很少」，放句首須倒裝為 have + 主詞 + p.p.。

sentence: _____ was he allowed to leave the classroom during the exam.
explanation: Under no circumstances 表示「在任何情況下都不」，放句首須倒裝為 was + 主詞。

sentence: _____ you finish your work on time will you be allowed to go home early.
explanation: Only if 表示「只有在...情況下」，主要子句須倒裝為 will + 主詞。

sentence: _____ had she finished her speech when the audience began to applaud.
explanation: Hardly...when 表示「一...就」，Hardly 放句首須倒裝為 had + 主詞 + p.p.。

sentence: _____ did the coach praise the team's effort, but he also gave everyone a small reward.
explanation: Not only...but also 中 Not only 放句首須倒裝為 did + 主詞 + 原形。

sentence: _____ in this small town had anyone seen such a strange creature before.
explanation: Nowhere 為否定地方副詞，放句首須倒裝為 had + 主詞 + p.p.。

sentence: _____ repeated attempts did the scientists finally succeed in the experiment.
explanation: Only after 表示「只有在...之後」，主要子句須倒裝為 did + 主詞 + 原形。

sentence: _____ difficult was the final exam that many students left the room in tears.
explanation: So + 形容詞 + be動詞 + 主詞 + that 為倒裝句型，表示程度之深。

sentence: _____ was his surprise that he could not say a single word.
explanation: Such + be動詞 + 主詞 + that 為倒裝句型，表示程度之深。

sentence: _____ a single word did the little boy say during the whole long trip home.
explanation: Not a single word 放句首否定，主要子句須倒裝為 did + 主詞 + 原形。

sentence: _____ should you share your personal password with a stranger online.
explanation: On no account 表示「絕不」，放句首須倒裝為 should + 主詞。

sentence: We _____ in this city since 2015, so we know it very well now.
explanation: since + 過去時間點，表示動作持續到現在，用現在完成式 have lived。

sentence: He _____ his homework already, so he can watch TV now.
explanation: already 常與現在完成式連用，表示動作已完成，故用 has finished。

sentence: I have never _____ such a beautiful garden before.
explanation: have + never + 過去分詞，表示「從未」，故用 seen。

sentence: They _____ dinner yet, so let's wait a little longer.
explanation: yet 常與現在完成式連用，表示「尚未」，故用 haven't had。

sentence: How long _____ the piano? — Since I was six years old.
explanation: 回答用 Since，表示動作持續至今，問句須用現在完成式。

sentence: My uncle _____ to Japan four times, and he wants to go again next month.
explanation: four times 表示經驗次數，用現在完成式 has been to。

sentence: She _____ her purse, so she can't pay for the ticket now.
explanation: 動作結果影響到現在（現在無法付錢），用現在完成式 has lost。

sentence: We _____ each other since we were in elementary school.
explanation: since 引導過去時間點，表示狀態持續至今，用現在完成式 have known。

sentence: This bridge _____ over a hundred years ago, but it is still very strong today.
explanation: 橋樑是被建造的對象，且為過去事件，用過去被動 was built。

sentence: The letters _____ by the postman every morning before eight o'clock.
explanation: letters 是動作的承受者，且為習慣性動作，用被動現在式 are delivered。

sentence: The new hospital _____ next year, according to the mayor's plan.
explanation: hospital 是被建造的對象，且為未來事件，用未來被動 will be built。

sentence: My bike _____ while I was in the classroom yesterday.
explanation: bike 是被偷的對象，且為過去事件，用過去被動 was stolen。

sentence: This song _____ by a famous singer many years ago, and it is still popular today.
explanation: song 是被創作的對象，且為過去事件（many years ago），用過去被動 was written。

sentence: English _____ in many countries around the world.
explanation: English 是被使用的語言，描述普遍事實，用被動現在式 is spoken。

sentence: The homework must _____ before Friday, or you will get a low score.
explanation: homework 是被完成的對象，情態動詞 must 後接被動不定詞 be finished。

sentence: The window in our classroom _____ by someone before we came in this morning.
explanation: 打破窗戶發生在「我們進教室之前」，且窗戶是被打破的對象，用過去完成被動 had been broken。

sentence: The boy _____ sits next to me in class is very friendly.
explanation: 先行詞 boy 是人，在子句中當主詞，用主格關係代名詞 who。

sentence: I like books _____ have happy endings.
explanation: 先行詞 books 是物，在子句中當主詞，用 which。

sentence: The woman _____ is standing near the door is my aunt.
explanation: 先行詞 woman 是人且為子句主詞，用主格關代 who。

sentence: Students _____ study hard usually get good grades.
explanation: 先行詞 students 是人且為子句主詞，用主格關代 who。

sentence: I have a dog _____ always makes me laugh.
explanation: 先行詞 dog 是動物（視為物），在子句中當主詞，用 which。

sentence: The people _____ live next door are very kind.
explanation: 先行詞 people 是人且為子句主詞，用主格關代 who。

sentence: The man _____ I met yesterday is a famous doctor.
explanation: 先行詞 man 是人，在子句中當受詞（I met him），用受格關代 whom。

sentence: This is the movie _____ we watched last weekend.
explanation: 先行詞 movie 是物且在子句中當受詞，用 which。

sentence: The teacher _____ the students respect most is Mr. Lin.
explanation: 先行詞 teacher 是人，在子句中當受詞（respect him），用受格關代 whom。

sentence: The song _____ I heard on the radio was very beautiful.
explanation: 先行詞 song 是物，在子句中當受詞，用 which。

sentence: The girl _____ my brother likes lives in the next town.
explanation: 先行詞 girl 是人，在子句中當受詞（likes her），用受格關代 whom。

sentence: That is the boy _____ father is a police officer.
explanation: 表示 boy 的 father，用所有格關係代名詞 whose。

sentence: I know a family _____ house is next to the river.
explanation: 表示 family 的 house，用所有格關係代名詞 whose。

sentence: The writer _____ novel won the prize will visit our school.
explanation: 表示 writer 的 novel，用所有格關係代名詞 whose。

sentence: We helped a boy _____ bike was broken.
explanation: 表示 boy 的 bike，用所有格關係代名詞 whose。

sentence: This is the park _____ we often play basketball.
explanation: 先行詞 park 是地點，用關係副詞 where。

sentence: I still remember the day _____ I first met you.
explanation: 先行詞 day 是時間，用關係副詞 when。

sentence: Nobody knows the reason _____ he left the team suddenly.
explanation: 先行詞 reason，用關係副詞 why 說明原因。

sentence: The town _____ my grandmother was born is very small.
explanation: 先行詞 town 是地點，用關係副詞 where。

sentence: I'll never forget the summer _____ we traveled around the island.
explanation: 先行詞 summer 是時間，用關係副詞 when。

sentence: This exam is _____ than the last one, so study harder.
explanation: than 表比較，hard 為單音節形容詞，比較級加 -er 為 harder。

sentence: My brother is _____ than me, so he can reach the top shelf.
explanation: than 表比較，tall 為單音節形容詞，比較級加 -er。

sentence: This question is _____ than that one, so let's answer it first.
explanation: than 表比較，easy 去 y 加 ier 為 easier。

sentence: Health is _____ important than money in life.
explanation: important 為多音節形容詞，比較級須用 more，配合 than。

sentence: The weather today is _____ than yesterday.
explanation: bad 的比較級為不規則變化 worse。

sentence: This car is _____ expensive than that one, so I can't afford it.
explanation: much 可修飾比較級表「更加」，expensive 為多音節須用 more expensive。

sentence: This is _____ building in the whole city.
explanation: 表示「全市中最高的」，用最高級 the tallest。

sentence: Of all my classmates, Amy is _____ diligent.
explanation: diligent 為多音節形容詞，最高級須加 the most。

sentence: This is _____ book I have ever read.
explanation: ever 配合最高級表「有史以來最…」，須加 the。

sentence: Mount Jade is _____ mountain in Taiwan.
explanation: 表示「台灣最高的山」，用最高級 the highest。

sentence: Who is _____ runner on the team?
explanation: 詢問「隊上最快的人」，用最高級 the fastest。

sentence: This bag is as _____ as that one, so they cost the same.
explanation: as...as 句型中間須用形容詞原級 heavy。

sentence: My sister can run as _____ as I can.
explanation: as...as 句型中間須用副詞原級 fast。

sentence: This lake is not as _____ as that one.
explanation: not as...as 句型中間用形容詞原級 deep。

sentence: Please try to be as _____ as possible when you take the exam.
explanation: as...as possible 中間須用形容詞原級 careful。

sentence: If it _____ tomorrow, we will stay home and watch movies.
explanation: 第一類條件句，if 子句用現在式表未來，主要子句才用 will。

sentence: If you _____ hard, you will pass the exam.
explanation: if 子句用現在簡單式，主要子句用 will + 原形動詞表未來結果。

sentence: We will go to the beach if the weather _____ nice this weekend.
explanation: if 子句表示條件用現在式 is，主要子句用 will go。

sentence: If you _____ me, I will help you with your homework.
explanation: if 子句用現在式 ask，配合主要子句 will help。

sentence: She will be very happy if she _____ the singing contest.
explanation: if 子句用現在式 wins，表示未來的可能條件。

sentence: If it doesn't rain, we _____ a picnic in the park tomorrow.
explanation: 主要子句表示未來結果，用 will + 原形動詞。

sentence: If I _____ a bird, I would fly around the world.
explanation: 與現在事實相反的假設，if 子句的 be 動詞一律用 were。

sentence: If she had more time, she _____ learn to play the guitar.
explanation: 與現在事實相反的假設句，主要子句用 would + 原形動詞。

sentence: If I were you, I _____ apologize to her right away.
explanation: If I were you 為典型假設語氣，主要子句用 would。

sentence: If he _____ harder, he would win the race.
explanation: 與現在事實相反的假設句，if 子句動詞須用過去式。

sentence: If we had a bigger kitchen, we _____ cook more often.
explanation: 與現在事實相反的假設，主要子句用 would + 原形動詞。

sentence: What would you do if you _____ a million dollars?
explanation: 與現在事實相反的假設句，if 子句用過去式 had。

sentence: I wish I _____ taller, but I am the shortest in my class.
explanation: wish 後接與現在事實相反的假設，be 動詞一律用 were。

sentence: She wishes she _____ more free time to travel.
explanation: wish 後表示與現在事實相反的願望，動詞用過去式 had。

sentence: I wish I _____ speak French fluently.
explanation: wish 後表達與現在事實相反的願望，情態動詞用過去式 could。

sentence: He wishes he _____ so much candy when he was young.
explanation: wish 後接與過去事實相反的假設時，用過去完成式 hadn't eaten。

sentence: By the time I arrived at the station, the train _____ already left.
explanation: 過去某時間點之前已完成的動作，用過去完成式 had left。

sentence: When I got home, I found that someone _____ the window.
explanation: 打破窗戶發生在「回家發現」之前，用過去完成式 had broken。

sentence: She _____ finished her dinner before her mother came home.
explanation: 吃完晚餐發生在媽媽回家之前，用過去完成式 had finished。

sentence: The movie _____ already started when we got to the theater.
explanation: 電影開演發生在「到達戲院」之前，用過去完成式 had started。

sentence: I had never seen snow before I _____ to Japan last winter.
explanation: 主要子句已用過去完成式 had seen，附屬子句表示單一過去動作，用過去式 traveled。

sentence: I _____ this book for two weeks, and I am almost finished.
explanation: for + 一段時間，強調動作持續進行至今，用現在完成進行式 have been reading。

sentence: It _____ raining since this morning, so the ground is still wet.
explanation: since + 時間點，強調動作持續至今，用現在完成進行式 has been raining。

sentence: They _____ for the bus for twenty minutes, and it still hasn't come.
explanation: for + 一段時間，強調持續動作，用現在完成進行式 have been waiting。

sentence: My eyes are tired because I _____ at the computer all afternoon.
explanation: all afternoon 強調持續到現在的動作，用現在完成進行式 have been looking。

sentence: I _____ my bike when it suddenly started to rain.
explanation: when 引導的過去單一動作打斷正在進行的動作，用過去進行式 was riding。

sentence: What _____ you doing at eight o'clock last night?
explanation: 描述過去某特定時刻正在進行的動作，用過去進行式 were doing。

sentence: While she _____ dinner, her phone rang.
explanation: while 表示正在進行的背景動作被另一動作打斷，用過去進行式 was cooking。

sentence: The children _____ in the park when it began to snow.
explanation: 過去某時刻正在進行的動作被另一過去動作打斷，用過去進行式。

sentence: I _____ TV when the lights suddenly went out.
explanation: 過去進行式表示動作正在進行時被打斷。

sentence: Look at those dark clouds! It _____ soon.
explanation: 根據現在的跡象（烏雲）預測即將發生的事，用 be going to。

sentence: I _____ my grandparents this weekend; I've already bought the train tickets.
explanation: 已經買好車票，表示事先計畫好的未來，用 be going to。

sentence: A: The phone is ringing. B: I _____ it.
explanation: 當下臨時決定的未來動作，用 will。

sentence: The train _____ at nine o'clock tomorrow morning.
explanation: 表示按照時刻表安排的未來，可用現在簡單式表示排定的未來。

sentence: Next year, my sister _____ college, so our house will be quieter.
explanation: next year 表示未來時間，用未來式 will enter。

sentence: We _____ a party for my mother's birthday next Saturday.
explanation: 事先計畫好的未來活動，用 be going to。

sentence: Please be quiet. My father _____ on the phone right now.
explanation: right now 表示此刻正在進行的動作，用現在進行式。

sentence: The sun _____ in the east every morning.
explanation: 描述恆常不變的自然現象，用現在簡單式 rises。

sentence: Look! The dog _____ after its own tail again.
explanation: Look 提示此刻正在發生的動作，用現在進行式。

sentence: My mother usually _____ breakfast for the whole family.
explanation: usually 表示習慣性動作，用現在簡單式 cooks。

sentence: My father enjoys _____ in the garden every weekend.
explanation: enjoy 後接動名詞當受詞，故用 working。

sentence: She finished _____ her homework before dinner.
explanation: finish 後須接動名詞當受詞，故用 doing。

sentence: _____ vegetables every day is good for your health.
explanation: 動名詞可當句子主詞，此處用 Eating。

sentence: He is good at _____ pictures with his phone.
explanation: 介系詞 at 後面須接動名詞，故用 taking。

sentence: Would you mind _____ the window? It's a bit cold in here.
explanation: mind 後面須接動名詞當受詞，故用 closing。

sentence: I am thinking about _____ a new bike for my birthday.
explanation: 介系詞 about 後接動名詞，故用 buying。

sentence: I want _____ a doctor when I grow up.
explanation: want 後面須接不定詞 to V 當受詞。

sentence: She decided _____ harder for the coming exam.
explanation: decide 後面須接不定詞 to V。

sentence: It is important for students _____ enough sleep every night.
explanation: It is + 形容詞 + to V 為固定句型，用不定詞。

sentence: My parents told me _____ home before dark.
explanation: tell + 受詞 + to V，表示要求對方做某事。

sentence: We were happy _____ the good news from our teacher.
explanation: 情緒形容詞（happy）後常接不定詞 to V 表原因。

sentence: He worked hard _____ enough money for the trip.
explanation: 不定詞可表示目的「為了…」，故用 to save。

sentence: Don't forget _____ the lights off before you leave the room.
explanation: forget to V 表示「忘記將要做的事」，故用 to turn。

sentence: I remember _____ this movie with my family last year.
explanation: remember + V-ing 表示「記得已做過的事」。

sentence: Please stop _____ during the movie; it's disturbing others.
explanation: stop + V-ing 表示「停止正在做的事」。

sentence: We stopped _____ a rest because we were very tired.
explanation: stop + to V 表示「停下來去做某事」。

sentence: _____ tired after the long trip, we decided to go to bed early.
explanation: 分詞構句中，主詞與 feel 為主動關係，用現在分詞 Feeling。

sentence: _____ from the top of the mountain, the city looks very small.
explanation: 分詞構句中，主詞 city 是被看見的，動作與主詞為被動關係，用過去分詞 Seen。

sentence: _____ his homework, Tom went out to play basketball.
explanation: 分詞構句表示「做完…之後」，主詞 Tom 與 finish 為主動關係，用現在分詞 Finishing。

sentence: _____ by the loud noise, the baby began to cry.
explanation: 主詞 baby 是被嚇到的，動作與主詞為被動關係，用過去分詞 Frightened。

sentence: _____ in a small village, she never saw the sea until she was ten.
explanation: 分詞構句表示「因為在小村莊長大」，主詞與 grow 為主動關係，用現在分詞 Growing。

sentence: The story was so _____ that all the students wanted to read it again.
explanation: story 本身「使人感興趣」，修飾事物用現在分詞 interesting。

sentence: I was really _____ in the science class today.
explanation: 人「感到有興趣」用過去分詞 interested。

sentence: The math problem was so _____ that nobody could solve it.
explanation: 事物「令人困惑」用現在分詞 confusing。

sentence: After hearing the news, everyone in the room was very _____.
explanation: 人「感到興奮」用過去分詞 excited。

sentence: It was a _____ game, and the fans cheered loudly until the end.
explanation: game 本身「令人興奮」，修飾事物用現在分詞 exciting。

sentence: You _____ turn off your phone during the exam.
explanation: 表示「必須」的義務，用 must。

sentence: _____ I borrow your pen for a minute?
explanation: 禮貌地請求許可，用 May。

sentence: You _____ be tired after such a long trip.
explanation: 根據合理推測「一定是」，用 must 表肯定推測。

sentence: It _____ rain later, so bring your umbrella just in case.
explanation: 表示「也許、可能」的推測，用 might。

sentence: Students _____ not run in the hallway; it's against the rules.
explanation: 表示禁止的規定，用 must not。

sentence: You look sick. You _____ see a doctor as soon as possible.
explanation: 表示建議，用 should。

sentence: When she was young, she _____ swim very fast.
explanation: 表示過去的能力，用 could。

sentence: This report must _____ before Friday afternoon.
explanation: report 是被完成的對象，情態動詞後接被動不定詞 be finished。

sentence: The problem can _____ easily if we work together.
explanation: problem 是被解決的對象，can 後接被動 be solved。

sentence: Loud music should not _____ in the library.
explanation: music 是被播放的對象，should 後接被動 be played。

sentence: This medicine must _____ after meals, not before.
explanation: medicine 是被服用的對象，must 後接被動 be taken。

sentence: _____ he was very tired, he kept studying for the exam.
explanation: 前後語意轉折（雖然累仍繼續讀書），用 Although。

sentence: She went to school _____ she had a bad cold.
explanation: 前後語意轉折（雖然感冒仍去上學），用 although。

sentence: _____ the movie was long, the children enjoyed every minute of it.
explanation: 表讓步「儘管電影很長」，用 Though。

sentence: He didn't give up, _____ he failed the first time.
explanation: 前後語意轉折（雖然第一次失敗仍不放棄），用 although。

sentence: We stayed at home _____ it was raining heavily outside.
explanation: 表原因「因為外面下大雨」，用 because。

sentence: _____ she studies hard every day, she always gets good grades.
explanation: since 在此表原因「既然、因為」，引導原因子句。

sentence: _____ it was getting dark, we decided to go home early.
explanation: as 在此表原因「由於天色漸暗」。

sentence: I couldn't answer the phone _____ I was taking a shower.
explanation: 表原因「因為在洗澡」，用 because。

sentence: The bag was so _____ that I couldn't lift it by myself.
explanation: so + 形容詞原級 + that 子句，表示「如此…以致於」。

sentence: He spoke so _____ that nobody could hear him clearly.
explanation: so 修飾動詞須用副詞 quietly，構成 so...that 句型。

sentence: It was such _____ day that we decided to go to the beach.
explanation: such + a/an + 形容詞 + 名詞 + that 子句為固定句型。

sentence: The music was so _____ that everyone started dancing.
explanation: so + 現在分詞形容詞（令人興奮的）+ that 子句。

sentence: I got up early _____ I could catch the first train.
explanation: so that 引導目的子句，表示「為了、以便」。

sentence: She studies every night _____ pass the entrance exam.
explanation: in order to + 原形動詞，表示目的「為了」。
optionsZh: （目的子句連接詞，誤，須接動詞）

sentence: We left home early _____ we wouldn't be late for the movie.
explanation: so that 引導目的子句，通常搭配助動詞 would/could。

sentence: He turned off the TV _____ study for tomorrow's test.
explanation: 不定詞 to V 可表示目的「為了讀書」。

sentence: You will be late for school _____ you leave right now.
explanation: unless = if...not，表示「除非」。

sentence: _____ it stops raining, the game will be canceled.
explanation: unless 表示「除非」，等於 if...not。

sentence: I won't go to the party _____ you go with me.
explanation: unless 表示「除非」你跟我一起去，否則不會去。

sentence: _____ I was walking home, I met my old classmate.
explanation: while 引導一段持續進行的背景動作，期間發生另一件事。

sentence: _____ the bell rang, all the students ran into the classroom.
explanation: when 引導單一時間點發生的動作。

sentence: _____ my mother was cooking, my father was reading the newspaper.
explanation: while 表示兩個動作同時進行，故用 while。

sentence: _____ he heard the good news, he jumped up with joy.
explanation: when 表示某一時間點發生的動作。

sentence: The soup was too _____ for the baby to eat.
explanation: too + 形容詞原級 + to V，表示「太…以致於不能」。

sentence: She is _____ enough to take care of her little brother.
explanation: 形容詞原級 + enough + to V，表示「足夠…以…」。

sentence: He ran too _____ for us to catch up with him.
explanation: too + 副詞原級 + to V，表示「太…以致於不能」。

sentence: This box is light enough _____ by a child.
explanation: enough + to V，表示「足夠…可以…」。

sentence: My mother always makes me _____ my room before dinner.
explanation: make + 受詞 + 原形動詞，表示「使、讓」。

sentence: Please let me _____ you with your bags.
explanation: let + 受詞 + 原形動詞。

sentence: The teacher had the students _____ their essays again.
explanation: have + 受詞 + 原形動詞，表示「要求某人做」。

sentence: My father won't let me _____ out after ten o'clock.
explanation: let + 受詞 + 原形動詞。

sentence: I saw him _____ across the street when the accident happened.
explanation: 知覺動詞 see + 受詞 + 原形動詞，表示看到完整過程。

sentence: We heard someone _____ our names outside the door.
explanation: 知覺動詞 hear + 受詞 + 原形動詞。

sentence: I felt the ground _____ during the earthquake.
explanation: 知覺動詞 feel + 受詞 + 原形動詞，表示感覺到完整動作。

sentence: Do you know _____ the museum opens?
explanation: 間接問句須用「疑問詞＋主詞＋動詞」的直述句語序。

sentence: Could you tell me _____ the station?
explanation: 間接問句語序為「疑問詞＋主詞＋動詞」。

sentence: I wonder _____ she will come to the party tonight.
explanation: 表示不確定的間接問句，用 if 引導（是否）。

sentence: _____ does this word mean in Chinese?
explanation: 詢問字義用疑問詞 what。

sentence: _____ books does she have on her shelf?
explanation: books 為可數名詞複數，詢問數量用 How many。

sentence: Can you tell me _____ this bus goes downtown?
explanation: 間接問句用 whether（是否）取代直接的 yes/no 問句。

sentence: You like playing basketball, _____?
explanation: 前句為肯定敘述句，附加問句用否定形式 don't you。

sentence: She isn't feeling well today, _____?
explanation: 前句為否定敘述句，附加問句用肯定形式 is she。

sentence: Let's go to the park this afternoon, _____?
explanation: Let's 開頭的祈使句，附加問句固定用 shall we。

sentence: My mother said that she _____ tired after work.
explanation: 主要子句 said 為過去式，依時態一致原則，從屬子句動詞也須改為過去式 was。

sentence: He told me that he _____ finish the project by Friday.
explanation: 主要子句 told 為過去式，情態動詞 can 須配合改為 could。

sentence: The teacher said that the earth _____ around the sun.
explanation: 描述永恆真理時，即使主要子句是過去式，仍維持現在式 goes。

sentence: She asked me _____ I had finished my homework.
explanation: 將 yes/no 問句轉為間接引語，用 if（是否）連接。

sentence: Never _____ such a beautiful sunset before.
explanation: 否定副詞 Never 置於句首，須用倒裝語序「助動詞＋主詞＋過去分詞」。

sentence: Not only _____ smart, but she is also very hardworking.
explanation: Not only 置於句首時，須用倒裝語序 is she。

sentence: Rarely _____ him complain about his difficult homework.
explanation: 否定頻率副詞 Rarely 置於句首，須用倒裝語序 do we hear。
optionsZh: （過去式倒裝，誤，語意應為現在）

sentence: My uncle _____ me a nice watch for my birthday.
explanation: give 可接雙受詞（人＋物），故用 gave me a watch。

sentence: Could you _____ me the salt, please?
explanation: pass 可接雙受詞（人＋物），表示「遞給」。

sentence: The teacher _____ us an interesting story yesterday.
explanation: tell 可接雙受詞（人＋物），故用 told us a story。

sentence: There _____ a lot of students in the library right now.
explanation: There be 句型須與後方名詞的單複數一致，students 為複數用 are。

sentence: There _____ some milk in the fridge, so you don't need to buy more.
explanation: milk 為不可數名詞，視為單數，用 is。

sentence: There _____ many people at the concert last night.
explanation: last night 表過去，且 people 為複數，用 were。

sentence: I wanted to go to the party, _____ I had too much homework to finish.
explanation: 前後語意轉折（想去但功課太多），用 but。

sentence: You can have tea _____ coffee; both are free.
explanation: 表示兩者選一，用 or。

sentence: It started to rain, _____ we decided to stay indoors.
explanation: 前後為因果關係（下雨所以留在室內），用 so。

sentence: Water _____ at 100 degrees Celsius.
explanation: 描述科學事實，用現在簡單式 boils。

sentence: My father _____ to the office by bus every day.
explanation: 主詞 father 為第三人稱單數，習慣性動作用現在簡單式加 s。

sentence: The shop _____ at nine o'clock every morning.
explanation: 表示固定的營業時間，用現在簡單式 opens。

sentence: We _____ to the zoo last Sunday and saw many animals.
explanation: last Sunday 為明確過去時間，用過去簡單式 went。

sentence: She _____ her keys yesterday, but she found them later.
explanation: yesterday 為明確過去時間，用過去簡單式 lost。

sentence: They _____ a wonderful trip to the mountains two years ago.
explanation: two years ago 為明確過去時間，用過去簡單式 had。

sentence: _____ a good friend is not always easy.
explanation: 不定詞片語可當句子主詞，表示「要成為…」。

sentence: My goal this year is _____ my English grade.
explanation: be 動詞後接不定詞當主詞補語，表示目標內容。

sentence: The doctor advised him _____ more vegetables and less meat.
explanation: advise + 受詞 + to V，表示建議某人做某事。

sentence: _____ you practice, the better you will become at playing the piano.
explanation: the + 比較級, the + 比較級 句型，表示「越…就越…」。

sentence: The _____ the fruit is, the more expensive it becomes.
explanation: the + 比較級, the + 比較級 句型，形容詞須用比較級 fresher。

sentence: He talks as if he _____ everything about computers.
explanation: as if 表示與現在事實相反的假設，動詞用過去式 knew。

sentence: If only I _____ more time to prepare for the exam!
explanation: If only 表示與現在事實相反的強烈願望，動詞用過去式 had。
